Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Rebekkah]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — Rebekkah has communicated with Gloria regarding Simon's foray into Endross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Rebekkah is a doll that Simon communicates with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Rebekkah started to laugh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Rebekkah communicates with Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Rebekkah told Simon to get his killer instinct back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — Rebekkah communicates with Simon mentally.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Rebekkah is a character who is currently in the graveyard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Rebekkah's left arm was half torn off at the shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — Rebekkah's arm was bound in a sling.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
